description_long: This object is a small group of urban trees and shrubs, each with distinct foliage and coloration. The central tree is the tallest, featuring a dense, upright canopy with dark green to brownish leaves, and a visible trunk at its base. Flanking this main tree are two smaller shrubs: one with lighter, silvery-green foliage and another with a more compact, olive-green appearance. The arrangement suggests a landscaped cluster, typical for parks, sidewalks, or residential green spaces. The foliage varies in density, with the central tree being the most robust and the side shrubs appearing more open. No visible roots extend above the ground, and the trunks are relatively slender.
description: A small cluster of urban trees and shrubs with varying foliage colors and densities, centered around a tall, dense tree with a visible trunk.
description_view_0: Three distinct trees and shrubs are visible, with the central tree being the tallest and most prominent, flanked by two smaller, bushier plants.
description_view_1: The group is seen from an angle, revealing the spatial arrangement and the varying heights and foliage densities of each tree and shrub.
description_view_2: The central tree dominates the view, with its dense canopy and visible trunk, while the side shrubs are partially obscured.
description_view_3: The cluster is viewed from the opposite side, highlighting the color differences and the more open structure of the side shrubs.
